title: papaveraceae
intro: The Papaveraceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the poppy family. This family includes approximately 435 species of plants, many of which are known for their brightly colored flowers and seed pods. Papaveraceae is a diverse group that encompasses a wide range of plant species, including annuals, perennials, and shrubs. The family is found in temperate and subtropical regions around the world, with the majority of species being native to Europe, Asia, and North America.
